creator: jonathan@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think you might be right: I only observed this issue on the second time I tried to set up the ZFS+GELI installation. The first time, I was blocked by another bug (which you have since fixed). This patch looks like it does the same things I had to manually complete before, so hopefully it's fixed now.

I'm not currently able to re-test on the same machine (it's my primary FreeBSD machine that I would rather not blow away at the moment), but would it help for me to try and run through the same scenario on a VM?

Thanks for improving our installer so much,


Jon
